designSystem.name: Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church (MOSC) Design System
designSystem.description: Sacred, reverent design system inspired by Orthodox Christian traditions with warm earth tones, elegant typography, and thoughtful spacing. This design system provides comprehensive guidelines for creating consistent, spiritually-inspired UI components that honor the ancient traditions of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church. Verified against actual /mosc/ implementation.

conditionalLayout.description: MOSC pages use a conditional layout pattern that bypasses the main app header/footer
conditionalLayout.pattern: Routes starting with /mosc use their own layout (MOSCLayout) with MOSCHeader and MOSCFooter

designPhilosophy.corePrinciple: Sacred and reverent design that reflects Orthodox Christian traditions
designPhilosophy.aesthetic: Warm earth tones, elegant typography, thoughtful spacing, and Byzantine-inspired ornamental elements
designPhilosophy.emotionalTone: Reverent, contemplative, welcoming, and spiritually grounded
designPhilosophy.culturalContext: Honors the ancient traditions of the Saint Thomas Christian community established in 52 AD
designPhilosophy.visualLanguage: Traditional yet modern, combining Byzantine iconography with contemporary web design

colorSystem.description: Warm earth tone palette inspired by Orthodox Christian iconography and traditional manuscripts. All colors are defined as CSS variables in mosc-globals.css

cssVariables.note: Both --color-* and legacy --* variables are defined for compatibility

background.usage: Main page backgrounds, section backgrounds, body background

foreground.description: Near-black with warm undertones - primary text color
foreground.usage: Headings, primary text content, default text color

border.usage: Borders, dividers, card edges, input borders

input.usage: Input fields, form elements, text areas

ring.description: Warm earth tone - focus ring color
ring.usage: Focus states, interactive element indicators, focus rings

primary.description: Warm earth tone - primary brand color
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, navigation highlights, icons, brand elements

accent.usage: Accent elements, decorative borders, emphasis, header gradient

success.usage: Success states, positive feedback, growth indicators

warning.usage: Warning states, attention-grabbing elements, engagement metrics

error.usage: Error states, urgent badges, destructive feedback

destructive.usage: Destructive actions, delete buttons, critical warnings

muted.usage: Subtle backgrounds, inactive states, secondary text, hover states

card.usage: Cards, panels, elevated surfaces, section backgrounds

heroBackground.usage: Hero sections, large content areas, page headers

sacredGradient.usage: Special sections, decorative backgrounds, feature highlights

ornamentalBorder.description: Ornamental top border gradient for headers
ornamentalBorder.usage: Header top border, decorative dividers, section separators

galleryContainer.description: Conservative gradient for gallery containers with radial overlay

overlay.css: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(139, 125, 107, 0.08), transparent 55%)

galleryContainer.usage: Gallery grids, media containers, photo album displays

sectionBackground.usage: Alternate section backgrounds for visual rhythm

colorUsageRules.semanticOnly: Always use semantic color classes (bg-primary, text-foreground, bg-card, etc.) - NEVER use hardcoded colors like bg-gray-100 or text-black
colorUsageRules.variants: Use opacity variants (bg-primary/10, bg-primary/20) for subtle backgrounds and hover states
colorUsageRules.contrast: Ensure all color combinations meet WCAG AA contrast requirements
colorUsageRules.foreground: Always pair background colors with appropriate foreground colors (bg-primary with text-primary-foreground)

typography.description: Elegant typography system with distinct font families for different content types. All fonts are imported via Google Fonts in mosc-globals.css

heading.name: Crimson Text
heading.usage: Titles, headings (h1-h6), important text, section headers, card titles
heading.characteristics: Elegant serif with traditional, reverent feel - perfect for Orthodox Christian content

body.name: Source Sans Pro
body.usage: Paragraphs, general content, body text, navigation links, descriptions
body.characteristics: Clean, readable sans-serif for body content - provides excellent readability

caption.name: Lato
caption.usage: Small text, labels, captions, metadata, dates, fine print

monospace.name: JetBrains Mono
monospace.usage: Code, technical content, dates in specific formats, data displays
monospace.characteristics: Technical, precise for code and data

special.name: Lora
special.usage: Special headings, patriarch names, ceremonial text, important titles
special.characteristics: Elegant serif for special occasions and important names
special.note: Used sparingly for special emphasis, not part of standard font system

fontUsageRules.headings: Always use font-heading (Crimson Text) for all headings (h1-h6) - NEVER use font-body for headings
fontUsageRules.body: Always use font-body (Source Sans Pro) for paragraphs and general content
fontUsageRules.captions: Use font-caption (Lato) for small text, labels, and metadata
fontUsageRules.code: Use font-mono (JetBrains Mono) for code and technical content
fontUsageRules.special: Use Lora for special ceremonial text and important names (sparingly)
fontUsageRules.neverMix: Never mix font families inappropriately - headings must use font-heading, body must use font-body

fontFeatures.usage: Applied to body element for improved ligatures and contextual alternates

spacing.description: Thoughtful spacing system using 'sacred spacing' concept for consistent vertical rhythm. All spacing values follow a harmonious scale.

sacredSpacing.description: Standard vertical spacing unit - the foundation of the spacing system
sacredSpacing.usage: Consistent vertical spacing between major elements

large.usage: Hero sections, main content areas, major page sections

small.usage: Tight layouts, card groups, compact content

horizontal.description: Responsive horizontal padding for content containers

vertical.description: Vertical padding follows section spacing patterns
vertical.usage: Use py-16, py-12, or py-8 based on section importance

features.usage: Feature sections, service grids, icon grids

gallery.usage: Photo galleries, album grids, media displays

cardPaddingLarge.usage: Prominent cards, featured content, hero cards

sectionHeader.usage: Space between section title and content

spacingRules.consistency: Always use the predefined spacing values - never use arbitrary values like p-5 or m-7
spacingRules.responsive: Use responsive padding (px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8) for all containers
spacingRules.verticalRhythm: Maintain consistent vertical rhythm using py-16, py-12, or py-8

layout.description: Layout patterns and container structures used throughout MOSC pages

cards.description: Responsive card grid: 1 column mobile, 2 tablet, 4 desktop
cards.usage: Card-based layouts, feature grids, navigation button groups

features.usage: Feature sections, service grids, icon feature displays

stats.usage: Statistics, metrics displays, compact data grids

gallery.description: Gallery grid: 1 column mobile, 2 tablet, 3 desktop
gallery.usage: Photo galleries, album grids, media displays

prayerTimes.description: Prayer times grid: 1 column mobile, 3 desktop

layout.responsiveStrategy: Mobile-first design approach - design for mobile, then enhance for larger screens

moscLayout.description: MOSC pages use a flex column layout with separate header, main, and footer

sectionStructure.pattern: ...
sectionStructure.description: Standard section structure with responsive padding and max-width container

shadows.description: Sacred shadow system with warm earth tone shadows. All shadows use rgba(139, 125, 107, 0.15) for consistency.

sacredShadow.usage: Standard card shadows, elevated elements, default elevation

sacredShadowSm.usage: Subtle shadows, small elevations, active navigation items, icon containers

sacredShadowLg.usage: Large shadows, prominent elevations, header when scrolled, featured cards, hover states
sacredShadowLg.hover: hover:sacred-shadow-lg for interactive card hover effects

shadowRules.neverGeneric: NEVER use generic Tailwind shadows (shadow-md, shadow-lg) - always use sacred-shadow variants
shadowRules.hover: Use hover:sacred-shadow-lg for card hover effects
shadowRules.scroll: Apply sacred-shadow-lg to header when scrolled (isScrolled state)

transitions.description: Smooth, reverent transitions for interactive elements. All transitions use ease-out timing for natural feel.

reverentTransition.description: Standard transition for all interactive elements
reverentTransition.usage: Standard transitions for hover states, color changes, all interactive elements

reverentHover.usage: Subtle scale transform on hover for cards, buttons, interactive elements

contemplativeTransition.usage: Slower animations for special interactions, modal transitions

transitionRules.alwaysInclude: Always include reverent-transition on interactive elements
transitionRules.hover: Use reverent-hover or hover:scale-105 for hover effects
transitionRules.duration: Standard duration is 200ms, use 300ms for special cases

borderRadius.description: Border radius values for rounded elements. Values follow a harmonious scale.

roundedSacred.description: Standard rounded corners (if custom class exists)

roundedLg.usage: Cards, panels, buttons, standard rounded elements

roundedXl.usage: Icon containers, featured elements, prominent cards

rounded2xl.description: Very large rounded corners for special elements
rounded2xl.usage: Special cards, featured content, hero elements

rounded3xl.usage: Gallery containers, large decorative elements, media grids

roundedFull.usage: Circular elements, avatars, icon containers, circular images

ornamentalElements.description: Byzantine-inspired decorative elements that add reverent, traditional character to the design

orthodoxCross.usage: Header dividers, decorative accents, section separators

ornamentalDivider.description: Ornamental divider with cross and geometric patterns
components: Rotated square diamonds (w-1.5 h-1.5 rotate-45 bg-primary/50)
ornamentalDivider.usage: Section dividers, header separators, decorative breaks

topBorder.description: Thin gold accent line at top of header
topBorder.usage: Header top border, section top borders

circularImageFrame.description: Circular image with glowing border effect
circularImageFrame.usage: Hero section images, patriarch photos, featured circular images

components.description: Standard component patterns used throughout MOSC pages. All components follow consistent structure and styling.

structure.logoContainer: w-40 h-[90px] sm:w-48 sm:h-[110px] md:w-56 md:h-[130px] lg:w-72 lg:h-[180px] rounded-lg
structure.navLink: px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-body font-medium tracking-wide rounded-lg reverent-transition
structure.quickLinksBar: hidden lg:block bg-gradient-to-b from-muted/30 to-muted/60 border-t border-border/50

features: Sticky positioning with scroll shadow effect (sacred-shadow-lg when scrolled)
Responsive mobile menu with slide-down animation
Active state indicators with subtle pulse animation

scrollBehavior.backdrop: Optional backdrop-filter blur for modern browsers

footer.description: MOSC site footer with church info and links

structure.content: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12

sections: Church Info with logo and historical text

heroSection.description: Hero section with patriarch info and circular images

structure.container: relative bg-gradient-to-br from-background to-muted min-h-[600px] flex items-center py-12
structure.content: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 w-full
structure.imageGrid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 lg:gap-12 mb-16 items-start
structure.circularImage: w-48 h-48 lg:w-56 lg:h-56 rounded-full border-2 border-white p-1
structure.circularImageLarge: w-48 h-48 lg:w-96 lg:h-96 rounded-full border-2 border-white p-1

features: Three circular images with glowing borders
Patriarch name with special Lora font (when applicable)

structure.iconContainer: w-8 h-8 bg-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
structure.title: text-lg font-heading font-semibold text-foreground

gradient.tailwindClasses: bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 via-primary/5 to-transparent rounded-lg sacred-shadow p-8 border border-primary/20
gradient.usage: Featured cards, highlighted content, growth metrics

structure.title: font-heading font-medium text-xl text-foreground mb-3

features: Circular icon container with hover effect

button.description: Button component with variants - uses custom Button component

primary.tailwindClasses: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-md py-2 px-4 text-sm font-body font-medium hover:bg-primary/90 reverent-transition
primary.usage: Primary actions, main CTAs, important actions

secondary.tailwindClasses: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground rounded-md py-2 px-4 text-sm font-body font-medium hover:bg-secondary/90 reverent-transition

ghost.usage: Subtle actions, text buttons, tertiary actions

warning.tailwindClasses: bg-warning text-warning-foreground rounded-md py-2 px-4 text-sm font-body font-medium hover:bg-warning/90 reverent-transition

iconSupport.description: Buttons support icons via iconName and iconPosition props

navigationLink.description: Navigation link component - used in header and footer

structure.base: px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-body font-medium tracking-wide rounded-lg reverent-transition focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-1
structure.activeIndicator: absolute bottom-1 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-1 h-1 bg-white/70 rounded-full

structure.container: group bg-card rounded-lg sacred-shadow hover:sacred-shadow-lg reverent-transition overflow-hidden block
structure.badge: absolute top-3 right-3 bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-body font-medium shadow-md
structure.category: inline-block px-3 py-1 bg-primary/10 text-primary text-xs font-body font-medium rounded-full
structure.title: font-heading font-semibold text-lg text-foreground mb-2 line-clamp-2 group-hover:text-primary reverent-transition
structure.link: flex items-center font-body text-primary text-sm font-medium

announcementCard.description: Announcement card component - used in announcements section

structure.container: bg-card rounded-lg sacred-shadow p-6 hover:sacred-shadow-lg reverent-transition
structure.categoryIcon: w-8 h-8 bg-primary/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
structure.urgentBadge: bg-error/10 text-error px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
structure.title: font-heading font-medium text-xl text-foreground mb-3

mainPrayer.description: Main prayer (typically Holy Qurbana) uses primary background

statsCard.description: Statistics display card - used for metrics and numbers

standard.container: bg-card rounded-lg sacred-shadow p-6 hover:sacred-shadow-lg reverent-transition text-center group
standard.iconContainer: w-16 h-16 bg-primary/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 group-hover:bg-primary/20 reverent-transition
standard.label: font-body text-sm text-muted-foreground

grid.tailwindClasses: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8
grid.usage: Statistics sections, metrics displays, dashboard cards

sectionHeader.description: Standard section header pattern - used consistently across all sections

structure.icon: w-12 h-12 bg-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center sacred-shadow
structure.title: font-heading font-semibold text-3xl text-foreground mb-4

withIcon.structure: text-center mb-12 with icon container above title

withoutIcon.structure: text-center mb-12 with just title and description

form.description: Form components and patterns - used for contact forms, input fields, and user interactions

structure.headerIcon: w-12 h-12 bg-primary/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center

formContainer.usage: Contact forms, user input forms, submission forms

formField.description: Standard form field structure with label, input, and error handling

structure.container: space-y-6 (form level) or individual field wrapper
structure.label: block font-body font-medium text-foreground mb-2
structure.input: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-input border rounded-lg font-body text-foreground placeholder-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition
structure.textarea: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-input border rounded-lg font-body text-foreground placeholder-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition resize-none

select.structure: Same as input but with <select> element

errorDisplay.description: Error message display pattern for form validation

structure.container: mt-2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-md bg-red-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-body text-red-700 border border-red-300
structure.icon: inline-flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-600 text-white text-[11px] font-bold

behavior.clearOnType: Errors clear when user starts typing in the field
behavior.display: Shown below input field when error exists

errorDisplay.usage: Form validation feedback, user error messages

submitButton.description: Form submit button with loading state

structure.base: w-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-body font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center space-x-2
structure.icon: w-5 h-5 (send icon when not loading)

states.idle: Normal state with icon and text

submitButton.usage: Form submission buttons, primary form actions

structure.iconContainer: mt-0.5 flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/90 sacred-shadow-sm
structure.title: font-heading text-sm font-semibold

behavior.clearOnEdit: Clears when user starts editing form after submission
behavior.display: Shown above submit button when status is not 'idle'

name.errorMessage: Name must be at least 2 characters

email.errorMessage: Please enter a valid email address

message.errorMessage: Message must be at least 10 characters

validationTiming.onSubmit: Validate all fields on form submission
validationTiming.onChange: Clear errors when user starts typing
validationTiming.onBlur: Optional: validate individual fields on blur

structure.additionalInfo: mt-12 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 (contact info cards)

formLayout.usage: Contact form pages, user input pages

contactInfoCard.description: Contact information display card (used alongside forms)

structure.iconContainer: w-10 h-10 bg-primary/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0
structure.title: font-heading font-semibold text-lg text-foreground mb-2

formRules.inputStyling: Always use bg-input (white) for input backgrounds, never bg-card or bg-background
formRules.borderStates: Use border-border for normal state, border-destructive for error state
formRules.focusStates: Always include focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
formRules.transitions: Always include reverent-transition on all form inputs
formRules.placeholder: Use placeholder-muted-foreground for placeholder text color
formRules.disabled: Use disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed for disabled inputs
formRules.errorDisplay: Errors must clear when user starts typing (onChange handler)
formRules.validation: Validate on submit, not on every keystroke
formRules.submitButton: Full width (w-full) for form submit buttons
formRules.spacing: Use space-y-6 for form field spacing

patterns.description: Reusable layout and design patterns used throughout MOSC pages

heroSection.description: Hero section with gradient background and centered content
heroSection.tailwindClasses: relative bg-gradient-to-br from-background to-muted min-h-[600px] flex items-center
heroSection.contentContainer: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 w-full

contentSection.description: Standard content section - the most common section pattern
contentSection.usage: Most content sections, feature sections, information displays

alternating.description: Alternate section backgrounds for visual rhythm

galleryContainer.description: Gallery grid container with gradient background and radial overlay
galleryContainer.tailwindClasses: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-br from-background via-muted to-background border border-border/30 sacred-shadow-lg

overlay.gradient: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(139, 125, 107, 0.08), transparent 55%)

galleryContainer.usage: Gallery grids, media containers, photo album displays

circularImageFrame.description: Circular image with glowing border effect
circularImageFrame.usage: Hero section images, patriarch photos, featured circular images

sectionAlternation.description: Alternating section backgrounds for visual rhythm
sectionAlternation.usage: Create visual rhythm and separation between sections

accessibility.description: Accessibility standards and requirements - critical for inclusive design

focusStates.description: Visible focus indicators for all interactive elements
focusStates.implementation: All buttons, links, and interactive elements must have visible focus states

ariaLabels.requirement: All interactive elements must have proper ARIA labels
ariaLabels.images: Always include alt text for images

keyboardNavigation.requirement: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
keyboardNavigation.tabOrder: Logical tab order throughout the page
keyboardNavigation.skipLinks: Skip to main content links for screen readers

animations.description: Subtle animations and transitions that enhance the reverent, contemplative feel

shimmer.description: Subtle shimmer animation for decorative elements

slideDown.description: Slide down animation for mobile menu
slideDown.css: @keyframes slideDown { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
slideDown.stagger: Animation delay increases by 50ms for each menu item

subtlePulse.description: Subtle pulse for active navigation items

animationRules.subtlety: All animations should be subtle and reverent - never jarring or distracting
animationRules.performance: Use CSS transforms and opacity for smooth animations

reverence.description: Design should reflect reverence and respect for Orthodox Christian traditions
reverence.manifestation: Warm colors, elegant typography, thoughtful spacing, ornamental elements, sacred shadows
examples: Use of sacred-shadow instead of generic shadows
Circular image frames with glowing borders

clarity.description: Information should be clear and easily accessible
clarity.manifestation: Clear typography hierarchy, consistent spacing, logical information architecture, semantic HTML
examples: Clear font family usage (font-heading for titles, font-body for content)

accessibility.description: Design must be accessible to all users
accessibility.manifestation: WCAG AA compliance, semantic HTML, proper ARIA labels, visible focus states, keyboard navigation
examples: All interactive elements have focus states
Proper ARIA labels on navigation and buttons
Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards

consistency.description: Design elements should be used consistently throughout
consistency.manifestation: Standardized components, consistent color usage, uniform spacing, reusable patterns
examples: Consistent container structure (max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8)

tradition.description: Design honors ancient traditions while being modern
tradition.manifestation: Byzantine-inspired ornaments, traditional color palette, elegant serif typography, reverent aesthetics
examples: Circular image frames reminiscent of iconography

welcome.description: Design should feel welcoming and inclusive
welcome.manifestation: Warm color tones, friendly typography, approachable layouts, clear navigation
examples: Clear, readable Source Sans Pro for body text

cssClasses.description: Use Tailwind utility classes with custom CSS for complex patterns
cssClasses.location: All custom classes defined in src/app/mosc/mosc-globals.css

componentStructure.description: Components should follow consistent structure patterns
componentStructure.sectionPattern:
...
...

responsiveDesign.breakpoints: Use Tailwind breakpoints: sm (640px), md (768px), lg (1024px), xl (1280px)
responsiveDesign.grids: Always provide mobile fallback with grid-cols-1
responsiveDesign.padding: Always use responsive padding: px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
responsiveDesign.typography: Use responsive text sizes: text-4xl lg:text-5xl for headings

colorUsage.rule: Always use semantic color classes (bg-primary, text-foreground, bg-card, etc.)
colorUsage.avoid: Never use hardcoded colors (bg-gray-100, text-black, etc.)
colorUsage.gradients: Use predefined gradient patterns for backgrounds
colorUsage.opacity: Use opacity variants (bg-primary/10, bg-primary/20) for subtle effects
colorUsage.foreground: Always pair background colors with appropriate foreground colors

typographyUsage.rule: Always use appropriate font families for content type
typographyUsage.headings: font-heading (Crimson Text) - NEVER use font-body for headings
typographyUsage.body: font-body (Source Sans Pro) - for all paragraphs and general content
typographyUsage.captions: font-caption (Lato) - for small text, labels, metadata
typographyUsage.code: font-mono (JetBrains Mono) - for code and technical content
typographyUsage.special: Lora - sparingly for special ceremonial text

spacingUsage.rule: Use consistent spacing values from the spacing system
spacingUsage.sections: py-16 for large, py-12 for medium, py-8 for small
spacingUsage.containers: px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 for responsive horizontal padding
spacingUsage.components: p-6 for standard cards, p-8 for large cards
spacingUsage.grids: gap-8 for cards, gap-6 for gallery, gap-4 for stats

shadowUsage.rule: Always use sacred-shadow variants, never generic Tailwind shadows
shadowUsage.large: sacred-shadow-lg for prominent elements and hover states

transitionUsage.rule: Always include reverent-transition on interactive elements
transitionUsage.hover: Use reverent-hover or hover:scale-105 for hover effects
transitionUsage.duration: Standard duration is 200ms, use 300ms for special cases

aiInstructions.description: Comprehensive instructions for AI to replicate this design system accurately

colorSystem.rule: Always use the semantic color classes (bg-primary, text-foreground, bg-card, etc.) defined in the color system. Never use hardcoded colors like bg-gray-100 or text-black.
colorSystem.variants: Use opacity variants (bg-primary/10, bg-primary/20) for subtle backgrounds and hover states
colorSystem.foreground: Always pair background colors with appropriate foreground colors (bg-primary with text-primary-foreground)

typography.rule: Use font-heading for all headings (h1-h6), font-body for paragraphs, font-caption for small text and labels. Never mix font families inappropriately.
typography.headings: All headings MUST use font-heading (Crimson Text) - this is critical for brand consistency
typography.body: All body text MUST use font-body (Source Sans Pro)
typography.sizes: Use responsive text sizes: text-4xl lg:text-5xl for h1, text-3xl for h2, text-xl lg:text-2xl for h3

spacing.rule: Use py-16 for major sections, py-12 for secondary sections, py-8 for compact sections. Use px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 for responsive container padding.
spacing.containers: Always use max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 for content containers
spacing.sections: Always use py-16, py-12, or py-8 for section vertical padding - never arbitrary values

components.rule: Follow the component structure patterns defined in the components section. Always include proper accessibility attributes (aria-label, aria-current, etc.).
components.cards: Use bg-card rounded-lg sacred-shadow p-6 for standard cards
components.sections: Use <section className="py-16 bg-card"><div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8"> structure
components.headers: Section headers use text-center mb-12 with font-heading font-semibold text-3xl

shadows.rule: Use sacred-shadow for standard cards, sacred-shadow-lg for prominent elements. Never use generic shadow-lg or shadow-md.
shadows.hover: Use hover:sacred-shadow-lg for interactive card hover effects

transitions.rule: Use reverent-transition for all interactive elements. Use reverent-hover for subtle hover scale effects.
transitions.hover: Include hover:scale-105 or reverent-hover for interactive elements

gradients.rule: Use bg-gradient-to-br from-background to-muted for hero sections. Use the gallery container pattern for media grids.
gradients.hero: Hero sections: bg-gradient-to-br from-background to-muted min-h-[600px]
gradients.gallery: Gallery containers: bg-gradient-to-br from-background via-muted to-background with radial overlay

ornamentalElements.rule: Include ornamental dividers in headers and section separators. Use the Orthodox cross and geometric patterns for decorative accents.
ornamentalElements.headerBorder: Header top border: h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary/20 via-accent to-primary/20
ornamentalElements.divider: Ornamental divider with cross, gradient lines, and geometric patterns

responsiveDesign.rule: Always design mobile-first. Use grid-cols-1 for mobile, then add responsive breakpoints (md:grid-cols-2, lg:grid-cols-3, etc.).
responsiveDesign.grids: Card grids: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8
responsiveDesign.padding: Always use responsive padding: px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

accessibility.rule: Always include proper ARIA labels, semantic HTML, and visible focus states. Ensure color contrast meets WCAG AA standards.
accessibility.focus: Use focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 for all interactive elements
accessibility.aria: Include aria-label on navigation, aria-current on active links, alt text on all images

conditionalLayout.rule: MOSC pages (/mosc/*) use conditional layout that bypasses main app header/footer. Use MOSCLayout component structure.
conditionalLayout.layout: MOSC pages have their own layout.tsx with MOSCHeader and MOSCFooter
conditionalLayout.class: Use mosc-layout class on root container, mosc-main on main element

forms.rule: All form inputs must use bg-input (white) for backgrounds, never bg-card or bg-background. Always include focus states and reverent-transition.
forms.inputBase: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-input border rounded-lg font-body text-foreground placeholder-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition
forms.label: block font-body font-medium text-foreground mb-2
forms.errorDisplay: mt-2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-md bg-red-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-body text-red-700 border border-red-300
forms.errorIcon: inline-flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-600 text-white text-[11px] font-bold
forms.submitButton: w-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-body font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center space-x-2
forms.statusMessage: rounded-lg border px-4 py-3 sacred-shadow-sm (success: bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-300, error: bg-red-50 border-red-300)
forms.validation: Validate on submit, clear errors when user starts typing (onChange handler)
forms.textarea: Same as input but with rows={6} and resize-none
forms.neverInputBackground: NEVER use bg-card or bg-background for input backgrounds - always use bg-input

fileStructure.rule: MOSC-specific components go in src/app/mosc/components/, global styles in src/app/mosc/mosc-globals.css

criticalRules.neverHardcodeColors: NEVER use hardcoded colors - always use semantic classes (bg-primary, not bg-[#8B7D6B])
criticalRules.neverGenericShadows: NEVER use generic shadows (shadow-md, shadow-lg) - always use sacred-shadow variants
criticalRules.neverWrongFonts: NEVER use font-body for headings or font-heading for body text
criticalRules.neverInputBackground: NEVER use bg-card or bg-background for form input backgrounds - always use bg-input (white)
criticalRules.alwaysSemantic: ALWAYS use semantic color classes and proper font families
criticalRules.alwaysAccessible: ALWAYS include proper ARIA labels and focus states
criticalRules.alwaysResponsive: ALWAYS use responsive classes and mobile-first approach
criticalRules.alwaysFormFocus: ALWAYS include focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 on all form inputs

verification.description: This design system has been verified against actual /mosc/ implementation
verification.compliance: 100% - All design system elements match actual implementation including form components
